topic: The medicine cabinet behind my mirror rearranges itself nightly, and new pills appear.
title: My Medicine Cabinet Rearranged Itself | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every night the medicine cabinet behind my mirror rearranged itself.
scenes.image_prompt: An open bathroom mirror cabinet with bottles arranged in neat rows on glass shelves, dim cold light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It hung above my sink in a quiet rented flat.
scenes.image_prompt: A bathroom sink with a mirrored medicine cabinet above it, frosted window beside, muted gray light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I am tidy. Tallest bottles left. Smallest on the right.
scenes.image_prompt: Medicine bottles lined by height on a glass shelf, orderly rows, soft bathroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning the order was reversed. Every bottle had moved.
scenes.image_prompt: Medicine bottles rearranged out of order on a glass shelf, one tipped over, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I told myself I was tired.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand reaching toward an open medicine cabinet, reflection blurred in the door glass, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then a bottle appeared that I had never bought.
scenes.image_prompt: An unfamiliar amber pill bottle without a label sitting among other bottles on a shelf, cold light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I photographed the shelves and taped the cabinet shut.
scenes.image_prompt: A mirrored cabinet door sealed with strips of tape, faint reflection of a dim room, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning the tape hung loose. New bottles inside.
scenes.image_prompt: Peeling tape dangling from a cabinet door slightly ajar, bottles visible within, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each new bottle held a name. None of them mine.
scenes.image_prompt: A pill bottle with a typed name label held in shadow, other bottles blurred behind, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night, a bottle with my own name and tomorrow's date.
scenes.image_prompt: A single amber pill bottle with a stark white label on an empty glass shelf, harsh dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I moved out that week and left the cabinet full.
scenes.image_prompt: An open medicine cabinet crowded with bottles in an otherwise empty bare bathroom, gray daylight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The new tenant called, asking why I left her medicine.
scenes.image_prompt: A closed mirrored cabinet reflecting an empty bathroom doorway, faint fog on the glass, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
